---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition to FanSafe
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Before opening this:** confirm your idea is in-scope. FanSafe's product
scope is fixed (see the top of `README.md`) — it explicitly does **not**
include marketplace, bookings, host profiles, payments, listings, or any
other FanLocal-shaped feature. Requests in that direction will be closed as
out of scope, not because they're bad ideas, but because they belong to a
different, not-yet-built product.

## What problem does this solve for a traveller?

## Proposed change

## Does this touch medical-card, trusted-contact, location, or incident-
## record data?

If yes, describe how it fits `PRIVACY.md`'s existing model (local-only,
explicit-action-only) — a feature that requires a new server, new stored
category of PII, or new default-on data collection needs that trade-off
discussed here before any code is written.

## Alternatives considered
